task_description: Implement foundational infrastructure for the Sleep Audio Pipeline using strict TDD: Input S3 Bucket (encrypted, versioned, EventBridge-enabled), Output S3 Bucket (encrypted, versioned), and EventBridge Rule triggered on Object Created events from the input bucket with a placeholder target.

verification.summary: All 10 tests pass (S3 bucket count, encryption, versioning, public access, EventBridge notifications on input bucket, EventBridge rule pattern and target, snapshot). CDK synth succeeds. Review Issue #1 fixed: tests now distinguish input from output bucket via resourceCountIs and Custom::S3BucketNotifications assertion. Issues #2-4 intentionally deferred for stub phase.
